unicodedata/mirrored.name: mirrored
unicodedata/mirrored.description: Returns the mirrored property assigned to the character chr as integer. Returns 1 if the character has been identified as a “mirrored” character in bidirectional text, 0 otherwise. For example: >>> unicodedata.mirrored('>') 1
